pi_items.source: Explicitly stated in task description ('50 meters') and checked in verifier logic (45 <= depth_val <= 55)
Explicitly stated in task description ('20 minutes of bottom time') and checked in verifier logic (total_min >= 15)
Explicitly stated in task description ('Trimix 21/35 (21% O2, 35% He, 44% N2)') and checked in verifier logic (18 <= o2_val <= 25)
Explicitly stated in task description ('Trimix 21/35 (21% O2, 35% He, 44% N2)') and checked in verifier logic (30 <= he_val <= 40)
Explicitly stated in task description ('EAN50 (50% O2)') and checked in verifier logic (45 <= o2_val <= 55)
Explicitly stated in task description ('bottom SAC rate to 20 L/min')
Explicitly stated in task description ('deco SAC rate to 15 L/min')
Implied by the standard gas switching setup in Subsurface without CCR/setpoint parameters

privileged_info_summary: The task requires planning a technical open-circuit decompression dive using the real Subsurface SampleDivesV2.ssrf logbook data. The verified requirements exactly match the task description: 50m depth, 20-minute bottom time, Trimix 21/35 (21% O2, 35% He) as bottom gas, EAN50 (50% O2) as deco gas, and SAC rates of 20 L/min (bottom) and 15 L/min (deco).
